form.formComment: Returns from a 54-day let-up. At the latest run sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 10 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on February 15 over 1609m, 13 len behind Great Actress with 54kg at $47.90. The run before that 9th of 11 at Tampa Bay Downs Turf on January 14 over 1710m, 19 len behind Missus Seki with 54kg at $63.80. Can't recommend.
